zh.Overbury, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾奧維波利
zh.Canterbury, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Bate於1440年出生在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞時，他的父親Sir John Thomas Bates25歲，母親Lady Sara Agnes Roberts25歲。他於大約1459年與Margaret Agnes Parre在英國肯特萊德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年10月在英國享年49歲，埋葬在英國肯特萊德。

zh-hans.Overbury, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾奧維波利
zh-hans.Canterbury, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Bate于1440年出生在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞时，他的父亲Sir John Thomas Bates25岁，母亲Lady Sara Agnes Roberts25岁。他于大约1459年与Margaret Agnes Parre在英国肯特萊德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年10月在英国享年49岁，埋葬在英国肯特萊德。

nameMeanings.name: Bate
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Bate. It could represent an unrecorded Old English name Bata, or a form of Batte, a short form of Anglo-Norman French names beginning with Bart-, such as Bartelmeu (see Bartholomew ) or Bartram (see Bertram ).
perhaps a topographic name from an unrecorded Middle English antecedent of the modern English dialect bate ‘river island or land liable to flooding’.

variants.name: Bateson
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): patronymic from   Bate   or   Batt  .

variants.name: Batten
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Baten or Batun, a diminutive of Bat (see Bate ).

variants.name: Batey
meanings: English (mainly Northumberland): from a pet form of the Middle English personal name Bate (see Bate ).

variants.name: Batkin
meanings: English (Staffordshire): from the Middle English personal name Batkin, from the personal name Bate + the diminutive suffix -kin.

variants.name: Bartholomew
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bertilmew, Bertelmy, a borrowing of the Old French form of the Biblical personal name Bartholomew (from Latin Bartholomaeus; Hebrew ‘son of Talmai’, said to mean ‘having many furrows’, i.e. rich in land). This was an extremely popular personal name in Christian Europe, with many vernacular derivatives. It derived its popularity from the apostle Saint Bartholomew (Matthew 10:3), who was, among other things, the patron saint of tanners, vintners, and butlers.
As an Irish name, it has been used as an Anglicized form of Mac Pharthaláin (see McFarlane ).

variants.name: Bateman
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Bateman, Bat(te)man, and in the West Midlands of England Batemon, a pet form of Bate or Batte with the hypocoristic suffix -man.

variants.name: Bates
meanings: English: variant of Bate with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also common in Ireland.
Americanized form of German   Betz  . See also   Betts  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Bate was born in 1440, in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Thomas Bates, was 25 and his mother, Lady Sara Agnes Roberts, was 25. He married Margaret Agnes Parre about 1459, in Lydd, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in October 1489, in England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Lydd, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Bate est né en 1440, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Thomas Bates, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Sara Agnes Roberts, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Agnes Parre environ 1459, à Lydd, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en octobre 1489, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Lydd, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Bate 1440 in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Thomas Bates 25 und seine Mutter Lady Sara Agnes Roberts 25. Er hat um 1459 in Lydd, Kent, England Margaret Agnes Parre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Oktober 1489 im Alter von 49 Jahren in England und wurde in Lydd, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bate è nato il nel 1440 nel Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Thomas Bates, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Sara Agnes Roberts, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Agnes Parre circa 1459, nel Lydd, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1489, nel England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Lydd, Kent, England.

ja.Canterbury, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Bateが1440年にイギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Thomas Batesは25歳，母Lady Sara Agnes Robertsは25歳であった。約1459年にイギリスケントリッドでMargaret Agnes Parreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年10月にイギリスで49歳で死去し，イギリスケントリッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Bate(이)가 1440년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Thomas Bates(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Sara Agnes Roberts(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1459년 영국 켄트 리드에서 Margaret Agnes Parre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 10월 영국에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 리드에 묻혔다.

mn.Canterbury, Kent, England: Canterbury, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Bate nasceu em 1440, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Thomas Bates, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sara Agnes Roberts, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Agnes Parre aproximadamente 1459, em Lydd, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1489, em Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Lydd, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Bate родился в 1440 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Thomas Bates было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Sara Agnes Roberts, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Agnes Parre около 1459 г. в местности лидд, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер октябрь 1489 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности лидд, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Bate nació en 1440, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Thomas Bates, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Sara Agnes Roberts, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Agnes Parre aproximadamente 1459, en Lydd, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1489, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Lydd, Kent, Inglaterra.
